# ArchLens

> MCP architecture analysis for real Java systems — indexes workspaces with Spoon, projects facts into a queryable architecture graph, and exposes typed MCP tools for tracing entrypoints, runtime paths, data flow, and change impact.

Java 25, Spoon, MCP stdio, TinkerGraph, Mermaid, LikeC4

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens/blob/main/README.md): Project overview and quick start
- [Install guide](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens/blob/main/docs/INSTALL.md): Client wiring for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and generic stdio clients
- [Tool reference](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens/blob/main/docs/TOOLS.md): MCP tool and prompt reference with arguments and examples
- [Architecture](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Package responsibilities and data flow
- [Java API Reference](https://archlens.dominikbreu.dev/api/): Doxygen-generated internal Java API docs
- [Changelog](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens)
- [JSON-RPC examples](https://github.com/DerPate/archlens/tree/main/examples/jsonrpc)
